task_description: Deep-dive research on ATMs specifically within and immediately bordering Kabukicho, building toward 15-20 real, distinct, individually-named entries (existing dataset has only 1). Search broadly: Seven Bank ATMs inside 7-Elevens actually within Kabukicho, bank branch ATMs (major Japanese banks: MUFG, Mizuho, SMBC, etc.) in the district, post office ATMs, any other international-card-friendly ATM networks (Prestia/SMBC Trust, Citibank legacy locations, etc.) in the Shinjuku/Kabukicho area. For each: name, approximate lat/lng (cite source), description (fees, card compatibility, hours), tags from {24h, international_card_ok}, reliability_score (1-5), source_type, type (official/unofficial). Do not fabricate -- report fewer with an explicit note if genuinely fewer distinct citable locations exist. Read-only research output only.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
